<!--
  感谢贡献！请填写以下内容。标题请遵循 Conventional Commits：
  <type>(<scope>): <subject>，例如 feat(api): 新增任务导出接口
  Thanks for contributing! Title must follow Conventional Commits.
-->

## What & Why / 改动内容与动机

<!-- 简述本 PR 做了什么、为什么。Describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Related issues / 关联 issue

<!-- 用 "Closes #123" 关联可自动关闭的 issue。Use "Closes #123" to auto-close. -->
Closes #

## Type of change / 变更类型

- [ ] fix — 缺陷修复 / bug fix
- [ ] feat — 新功能 / new feature
- [ ] refactor — 重构（无行为变更）/ refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs — 文档 / documentation
- [ ] test — 测试 / tests
- [ ] chore — 构建或工具 / build or tooling

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] 我的 commit 已带 DCO 签名（`git commit -s`）/ My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`). 见 [CONTRIBUTING](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] 标题遵循 Conventional Commits / Title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] 已为改动补充/更新测试（遵循三阶测试体系与命名规则）/ Added or updated tests per the project's testing rules
- [ ] 本地 `pre-push` 全套通过（单元 + 集成 + 覆盖率）/ Local `pre-push` passes (unit + integration + coverage)
- [ ] 已更新相关文档（README / docs）/ Updated relevant docs
- [ ] 未引入任何密钥、凭据或真实连接串 / No secrets, credentials, or real connection strings introduced
